reviews.comment:
El servivio es bueno, los playeros macanudos, pero... Nunca "NO HAY COLA" asi q siempre vayan con tiempo

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, the beach attendants are great, but... there's never a line, so always go with plenty of time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodEtEdkp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Falta invertir más en esta estación el personal hace todo lo que puede pero ya se quedó en el tiempo sobre todo en verano hay que esperar mucho para cargar combustible, y hacer cola en contra mano al costado de la ruta nada seguro. Los playeros trabajando a full hacen lo que pueden.

(Translated by Google)
More investment is needed at this station. The staff does everything they can, but it's outdated, especially in the summer when you have to wait a long time to fill up, and queuing against traffic on the side of the road is very unsafe. The attendants are working flat out, doing their best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNExidjR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Le pedí infinia NAFTA y por estar hablando y haciendo chistes con otro cliente me puso NAFTA súper hasta que nos dimos cuenta.
Debería estar más atento.
Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
I asked for infinite NAFTA, and while I was talking and joking with another customer, he called me NAFTA super until we realized.
I should have been more attentive.
Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbi12aE9REAE
